pulse: The Financials sector currently trades at a median EV/EBITDA of 7.8x and a median P/E of 14.9x, in line with broader market valuations, indicating a balanced relationship with overall market multiples. Notably, Goldman Sachs (GS) is positioned with a trailing P/E of 16.7x and revenue growth of 15.2%, aligning with the insights from the McKinsey report highlighting the shift to precision in banking; this suggests strong operational efficiency and potential for sustained outperformance. Looking ahead, the backdrop of rate cuts — as indicated by ETF Trends — may favor financial institutions with solid margins, such as JPMorgan Chase (JPM) with a profit margin of 33.9%, highlighting potential for enhanced profitability as borrowing costs decline.
